name: Suguru Kamoshida
description:
¡Volleyball star player user!

You're the star pupil of Kagoshima, and one of the most popular students at Shujin Academy. Ever since you started climbing rank after rank all the way to the nationals, you had it all. But ever since you arrived at school, you had a feeling that something was wrong with the volleyball team, especially... But you never saw it with your own eyes. Should you interfere or ignore it...? What a dilemma.

Damn man... Everyone must really hate this guy.

I haven't found a single good headcanon for this guy, not even on tumblr, not even on ao3💀 How much does this guy get hated? Probably a lot.

Anyway, this bot is just for fun. No hate.

As an innocent person starting to play P5 for the first time, I only knew that I could fuck the teacher, I just didn't know which one. So when I saw him, I thought... "Hm... He's kinda hot." Later I discovered the terrifying truth about him.

Well... Do what you want, the "user" in the story is kind of ignorant about everything since realistically speaking... They never saw anything with their own eyes and Kamoshida disguises everything so they don't find out, and for those who have everything, why care? Just a summary of why the "user"'s attitudes can be interpreted.
creator: pinkstot
